title: WINICE Scraper Tool, Stainless Steel 13-in-1 Painters Tool, Putty Scraper Professional Quality, Straight Scraper, Curved Scraper, Roller Cleaner, Nail Puller, Screwdriver, Hammer, Wallpaper Scraper
features: [ Professional Quality 13 In 1 Scraper]: Multi-functional putty scraper, curved scrapers, straight scraper, gauger, screwdriver, wallpaper scraper, roller cleaner, nail puller, can opener, bottle opener, and alloy metal hammer end
[ Premium Quality Scraper Materials]: The polished rust-proof stainless-steel blade ensures higher efficiency and longer life

[ More Comfortable Use]: Lightweight, soft grip designed to last for long jobs without discomfort to your hands, reducing hand fatigue. Non-slip grip for easy control. A lanyard hole balances practicality and aesthetics
[ An Ideal Tool for Long Use]: A multifunctional paint scraper for home Improvement and professional painters

[ Rust-Resistant Quality]: Made from high-quality stainless steel, this plastering tool offers superior corrosion resistance compared to carbon steel alternatives. Enjoy long-lasting durability, ensuring your paint scraper remains effective and reliable for all your projects.
description: Product Description WINICE 13 in 1 stainless steel scarper tools are built to the highest standard, designed and manufactured using input from professional finishers. PRODUCT FEATURES - Hardened, stainless steel. - Curved scrapers - Straight scraper - Gauger - Screwdriver - Roller cleaner - Nail puller - Can opener - Bottle opener - Alloy metal hammer end for resetting drywall nails. Also adds blade protection when dropped. - Easy-peel label. - Stay organized! All WINICE 13 in 1 stainless steel scraper tools feature large hang holes. PRODUCT WARNING WINICE 13 in 1 stainless steel blades are sharp. Store your WINICE tools out of reach of children! BLADE CARE - After each use, wash thoroughly and coat with a protective lubricant. - Stand upright after washing to allow the water to drip off and let the blades air dry.
